system.description: A dense bank of bilious fog billows out from the point the caster designates, obscuring all sight (including special vision abilities) beyond 5 feet, partially concealing creatures within 5 feet, and totally concealing those further away. It covers an area 50 feet x 20 feet x 20 feet. The fog drifts very slowly across the ground, blown by the wind (if any) though it cannot be blown back towards the caster. A moderate wind (11+mph) disperses the fog in 4 rounds, and a strong wind (21+mph) disperses it in 1 round. The fog produced by this spell always sink to the lowest level of the land, even pouring down openings such as sinkholes.
